mapper.select: merge into artist using ( values (#{input.id}::bigint, #{input.data.name}::text, #{input.data.type}::artist_type) ) as s(id, name, type) on (artist.id = s.id) or (artist.name = s.name and artist.type = s.type) when matched then update set name = coalesce(s.name, artist.name), type = coalesce(s.type, artist.type) when not matched then insert (name, type) values (s.name, s.type) returning artist.id, artist.name, artist.type, merge_action() as action
select id, name, type, null as action from artist where id = #{id}
